source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Display serif headings with calm interface sans text; Japanese guidance pairs Noto Serif JP for editorial emphasis with Noto Sans JP for dense product UI.
layout: Quiet dashboard layout on an 8px grid with 8px card radius, spiral dividers, chamber-like panels, restrained shadows, and clear data surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent nautilus motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image_gen on flat #ff00ff chroma key, followed by local alpha extraction with remove_chroma_key.py.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a single nautilus shell, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate nautilus shell with a cream spiral chamber structure, rust stripe banding, subtle pearly calcium texture, and small hints of deep ocean blue in the shadowed grooves. Show the shell as a graceful spiral knowledge-system emblem, natural but polished for a design catalog.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the shell. Slight three-quarter view so the spiral and shell depth are visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural color, surface ridges, chamber divisions, pearly highlights, and rust striping.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second shell, no animal body, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Nautilus", derived from the visible nautilus shell cutout in this conversation.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, spiral geometry, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the nautilus shell motif. The board must visibly respect cream chamber interiors, rust stripe banding, ocean-blue groove shadows, pearly highlights, and deep reef context.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny tables. Text must be clean and legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Nautilus", motif story "spiral knowledge system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Pearl Cream, Chamber Sand, Rust Stripe, Ocean Blue, Reef Ink, Foam White.
Typography: include English guidance for a refined product UI and Japanese guidance with readable sample text such as "知識の螺旋" and "海の記録". Use multilingual font guidance that would work for SaaS dashboards and editorial knowledge tools.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design-system board, realistic crisp UI mockup, quiet work-focused dashboard surface, 8px radius cards, restrained shadows, motif-derived texture strips and spiral dividers.
Color palette: warm near-white background from shell highlight, cream and sand surfaces, rust accent, ocean-blue primary, reef-ink text, no unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no dark-mode-only surface.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Nautilus" design-system board. It must feel like the same spiral knowledge system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible nautilus motif and the light-mode Morphous Nautilus board already in this conversation as references. Preserve the palette roles, component language, spiral dividers, shell texture rhythm, 8px radius, typography hierarchy, and knowledge-dashboard UI coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny token tables. Text must stay legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Nautilus", label "Dark Mode", motif story "spiral knowledge system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Reef Ink, Abyss Blue, Ocean Blue, Rust Stripe, Chamber Sand, Pearl Cream, Foam White.
Typography: include English guidance for a refined product UI and Japanese guidance with readable sample text such as "知識の螺旋" and "海の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for SaaS dashboards and editorial knowledge tools.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest reef ink and abyss blue, light text from pearl cream and foam white, ocean-blue primary controls, rust stripe accent states, chamber-sand muted surfaces, subtle shell-ridge texture overlays, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-compatible cards and controls.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
